description: Document a portable recipe for assigning a unique per-session identity (e.g. shuf from /usr/share/dict/words) via the agent harness. LLMs picking names themselves collapse to the same handful (we've seen three Junipers); claim collisions and confusing logs follow. Add a short tip near the BALLS_IDENTITY entry pointing at the SessionStart-hook pattern (Claude Code as one example, but the recipe is portable to any harness that can inject env vars or context at session start).
title: README: recommend SessionStart-style hook for unique BALLS_IDENTITY
